common.rateLimitedBody: You have made too many requests in a short time. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
common.errorBodyReload: A technical error occurred. Try reloading the page in a moment.
common.errorBodyRetry: A technical error occurred. Try again in a moment.

ansokningar.title: My applications
ansokningar.lede: A pipeline of all your applications. Click a row for details.
ansokningar.emptyBody: As soon as you register your first application, it appears here. Track status from draft to reply without losing a single application.

new.title: New application
new.lede: Add the job you are applying for. You can fill in the details later.
new.urlHint: Optional. The link must start with http:// or https://.
new.expiresAtHint: Optional. The date is shown as a reminder in the application list.
new.coverLetterHint: Optional. You can add or edit it later.

cv.title: CV
cv.lede: Manage your CV variants. Import an existing CV for a review, or create a new one from scratch. You always stay in control.
cv.matchBarText: Set which occupations, regions and employment types you are looking for. We suggest based on your CV. You choose what is included.
cv.emptyBody: Create your first CV to get started. You can have several variants (for example one for leadership and one for a technical role) and choose the right CV for each application.

pending.heading: CV to complete
pending.body: Your CV has been read but not saved yet. Complete it to save it and use it fully.

import.title: Import CV
import.lede: Upload your existing CV as a PDF or Word file. We read the contents and show a deterministic review with cited evidence. You stay in control. Nothing is changed in your CV until you save it yourself.
import.modalDescription: Upload your existing CV as a PDF or Word file. We read the contents and show a review. Your CV is not changed.

new.title: New CV
new.lede: Create a new CV from scratch. Give it a name and fill in your full name. You can change the rest later.
new.modalDescription: Create a new CV from scratch. Give it a name and fill in your full name. You can change the rest later.

detail.errorBody: A technical error occurred. Try reloading the page or go back to the CV list.

review.title: Review imported CV
review.lede: This is a deterministic review of your imported CV. Nothing has been changed in the file. The review only points out what you can improve, with cited evidence from your own text.
review.errorBody: A technical error occurred. Try reloading the page or go back to the CV list.

improve.title: Improve imported CV
improve.lede: These are deterministic improvement suggestions for your imported CV. Nothing has been changed in the file. Each suggestion shows a before-and-after change with cited evidence from your own text. You choose what to include when you write your CV.
improve.loadErrorTitle: Could not load the improvement suggestions
improve.errorBody: A technical error occurred. Try reloading the page or go back to the review.

gapFill.title: Fill in and save CV
gapFill.lede: We have filled in what the parser found in your file. Fill in the required fields (especially dates, which the parser never guesses) and save to create your CV.
gapFill.errorBody: A technical error occurred. Try reloading the page or go back to the review.

importApi.tooLarge: The file is too large. The maximum size is 10 MB.
importApi.noFile: No file was attached. Choose a PDF or Word file (DOCX).
importApi.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again.
importApi.unreadable: The file could not be read. Check that it is a PDF or Word file (DOCX) under 10 MB.

jobb.title: Search jobs
jobb.lede: Search among active listings from Platsbanken. Filter and compare without losing a single listing.

sokningar.title: Recent searches
sokningar.lede: Searches you made under Jobs. Click to run a search again, or remove one you no longer need.

sparade.title: Saved listings
sparade.lede: Listings you have saved to return to later. Open a listing to see details or remove the bookmark.

foretag.title: Companies
foretag.lede: Companies you follow and your application history per employer.

matchningar.title: My matches
matchningar.lede: Job ads that background matching has found for you, most recent first. Open an ad to read all of it.
matchningar.newBadgeAriaLabel: New match since your last visit
matchningar.emptyBody: Background matching runs every night once you have turned on Match notifications under Settings (off by default) and specified which occupations you are looking for. As soon as a job ad matches your profile it appears here.
matchningar.boundedLink: Find more via the match filter in the job list

installningar.title: Settings
installningar.lede: Manage your account details and settings.
installningar.profileNotCreated: Your profile has not been created yet. Fill in the details below to get started.
installningar.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
installningar.profileLoadError: The profile could not be loaded right now. Try reloading the page in a moment.

login.title: Log in
login.rememberMeHint: You stay logged in on this device for up to 180 days and can log out anytime. On a shared computer, leave the box unchecked.

register.title: Create account
register.nameHint: This name is shown in your account.
register.rememberMeHint: You stay logged in on this device for up to 180 days and can log out anytime. On a shared computer, leave the box unchecked.

actions.registrationFieldsRequired: Name, email and password are required.
actions.loginFailed: Login failed. Check your email and password.
actions.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Try again.
actions.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again.
